rationale: Removed the Ctrl/Cmd+V keydown interception so unsupported clipboard reads no longer block native paste delivery.
Top-level automated review wrapper only; the actionable inline feedback is tracked and handled separately.
Keyboard paste now relies on the browser paste event, keeping clipboard-read permissions only for the explicit toolbar action.
Replaced the obsolete Ctrl+V test with a regression asserting the shortcut is left unhandled for the native paste event path.
Summary review comment with no separate actionable request beyond the inline feedback already addressed.
Removed the superseded --mm-executing-sweep-duration and --mm-executing-sweep-delay variables so the stylesheet keeps only the active cycle-duration contract.
Dropped the obsolete CSS test expectations for the removed duration and delay tokens so the suite reflects the active shimmer contract only.
Simplified the single-quoted selector string literal to remove unnecessary escaped double quotes.
Top-level review summary only; its actionable items were handled through the inline review comments above.
